creator: rcyu@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to pasi from comment #2)

It seems this mailing list is alive.
https://lists.stacken.kth.se/pipermail/bus/
I saw some BSD keywords in the archives.

Perhaps you can contact them through the mailing list email address or subscrible via the mailman webpage.


I will update the link from http://bsdusers.se/ to the mailman pages(https://lists.stacken.kth.se/mailman/listinfo/bus).
